sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.section_prompt: State that this report records the evaluation, scoring, and qualification decision for an individual supplier per procedure {ref:SC-002}, and feeds the Approved Supplier List {ref:SC-001} and monitoring record {ref:SC-005}.

sections.title: 2. Supplier Identification
sections.content: Evaluation conducted by {company_legal_name} for supplier of components / services associated with {device_name_model}. Classification (Critical/Major/Minor) is established per {ref:SC-002} §3.

sections.title: 3. Supplier Profile
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate ~14 profile attributes with placeholder values for a typical critical medical-device supplier: Legal name, Trading name, Address & site(s), Country, Tax/Reg ID, Contact (name/role/email), QMS certification (ISO 13485 cert #, issuer, expiry), Other certs (ISO 9001, ISO 14971, IEC 62304, SOC 2), Regulatory registrations (FDA Establishment #, EU Authorised Rep), MDSAP status, Products/services supplied, Sub-tier supplier disclosure, Years in business, Financial stability source. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 4. Weighted Scoring Against SC-002 Criteria
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate exactly the same criteria set defined in {ref:SC-002} §4 (QMS cert, regulatory status, technical capability, capacity, financial, OTD, quality PPM, change-notification, sub-tier control, cybersecurity, RoHS/REACH, BCP). Provide plausible scores (0–5), compute weighted = weight * score / 5, and reference evidence (e.g. "Cert #ISO13485-XXXX", "SAQ Rev A", "Audit Report {ref:SC-007}"). Add a final TOTAL row with sum of weighted scores against 100. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 5. Audit Findings (if applicable)
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate 3–5 example findings from a supplier audit conducted under {ref:SC-007}. Severity = Minor/Major/Critical. Each Major or Critical finding MUST list a SCAR id and link to CAPA, e.g. "SCAR-2025-007 → {ref:CA-001} / {ref:CA-002}". Minor findings may reference observation tracker. Return JSON array.

sections.title: 6. Supply-Chain Risk Assessment
sections.section_prompt: Summarise risks identified (single-source, geopolitical, cybersecurity, sub-tier opacity, capacity, regulatory) and mitigations. Cross-reference risk controls in {ref:RD-007} where supplier failure could affect device safety/performance. State residual risk acceptability.

sections.title: 7. Qualification Decision
clauses: 7.1 Decision: Approved / Approved with conditions / Rejected
7.2 Approval scope (products/services, sites, max order value)
7.3 Conditions & required CAPAs — each linked to {ref:CA-001} / {ref:CA-002}
sections.section_prompt: For each clause, write the actual decision text in passive/declarative form suitable for an auditable record. Make explicit which CAPAs gate conditional approval.

sections.title: 8. Traceability Matrix
sections.ai_rows_prompt: Generate fixed traceability rows mapping: Qualification procedure → {ref:SC-002}; Approved Supplier List → {ref:SC-001}; Monitoring scorecard → {ref:SC-005}; Audit report → {ref:SC-007}; SCAR register → {ref:SC-006}; CAPA → {ref:CA-001}; CAPA form → {ref:CA-002}; NCR → {ref:CA-007}; Risk file → {ref:RD-007}; Change assessment → {ref:RA-008}; Quality Manual → {ref:QP-001}. Return JSON array.

output_config.header: {company_legal_name} | SC-003 Supplier Evaluation & Qualification Report | Rev {revision_number}
